landing.page_title: AuctionBall — Run your tournament auction in minutes

hero.body: AuctionBall is a hosted platform for tournament organizers — cricket, football and beyond. Sign up, pick a subdomain, add your players and teams, and run a fully real-time auction — control center, big-screen display, team-device bidding — without installing anything.

steps.heading: Three steps from sign-up to sold.
steps.body: No installs, no servers, no API keys. Create your organization and you are minutes away from a working live auction on your own subdomain.
steps.s1_body_a: Pick an org name and a subdomain. Your dashboard is live at
steps.s1_body_b: in 30 seconds — Free tier, no card.
steps.s2_body: Create a season, set the per-team purse, then bulk-import players via CSV or add them one at a time. Invite team owners by email — each gets a private bidding link.
steps.s3_body_a: Open the control panel on your tablet, project
steps.s3_body_b: on the venue display, send captains their team device URL. Bids fly in real time.

features.body: One hosted platform. Control panel, big-screen, team-device, multi-season, billing — all in your browser, all on every plan including Free.
features.engine_body: Every action — start, pause, bid, sold, unsold — pushes through a private WebSocket channel scoped to your organization. The control panel, big screen and every team device stay perfectly in sync, with no polling and no perceptible lag.
features.bigscreen_body_b: . 4K-ready, animated sold popups, team budget ticker.
features.multi_body: Run BPL 2025 and BPL 2026 from the same organization. Each season has its own teams, purse, players and audit log — switch between them with one dropdown.
features.profiles_body: Players carry a photo, category (Elite / Regular / New), base price, jersey number, batting and bowling style. Teams map to user accounts so each captain logs in and sees only their squad and remaining purse.
features.control_body: Tablet-friendly panel with Start, Pause, Sold, Unsold and Reset — plus keyboard shortcuts (Space, S, U, R) for fast auctioneers. Full timestamped audit log of every bid, override and reset.
features.mobile_body: Each team gets a unique bidding link, regenerable per season. Captains open it on any phone — works at 360px+, no app needed. BID NOW button, real-time budget tracking, instant disable when funds run out.

bigscreen_section.heading: This is your venue display.
bigscreen_section.body_b: on the projector or 4K TV. Real-time updates via WebSocket — no refresh, no lag.

pricing.heading: Simple, BDT-priced plans.
pricing.body_a: Start free, upgrade when you outgrow it. Monthly billing, cancel any time. Need an Enterprise plan with white-label and SSO?
pricing.free_tagline: Try the full auction flow with a small tournament. No credit card needed.
pricing.starter_tagline: For organizers running club tournaments and corporate cricket cups.
pricing.starter_b3: Up to 100 players, {teams} teams per season
pricing.pro_tagline: For agencies and federations running mid-sized tournaments.
pricing.pro_b5: Logo on big-screen and team device
pricing.enterprise_tagline: For large federations and franchise leagues with no upper bound.

why.body: You should be focused on cricket, sponsors, and the big screen — not on servers, security patches, or SSL certificates. Let us handle that part.
why.i1_body: Sign up, get your subdomain, run an auction in 5 minutes. We handle hosting, scaling, backups, SSL — you focus on the tournament.
why.i2_body: WebSocket channels keep the control panel, big-screen and every team device in millisecond sync. No 2-second lag, no thundering herd on the database.
why.i3_body: Every player, team, bid and season is scoped to your organization. Other organizers cannot see your data — period. Your tournament is your tournament.
why.i4_body: BDT pricing. bKash, Nagad, Rocket and SSLCommerz checkout. Bengali UI alongside English. Asia/Dhaka timezone by default.

testimonials.t1_quote: We ran our 12-team corporate cricket cup on AuctionBall — control panel on the iPad, big screen via projector, captains bidding from their phones. Setup took ten minutes, not ten hours.
testimonials.t2_quote: The big-screen view sold us. Plug a laptop into the projector, open the live URL, instant venue display. Captains opened their team link on their phones and we went live in minutes.
testimonials.t3_quote: Multi-season was the killer feature. We run six tournaments a year and now they are all on one dashboard with full audit logs and CSV export. No more spreadsheets, no more lost data.

faq.heading: Questions, answered.
faq.q1: Do I need to install anything?
faq.a1: No. AuctionBall is fully hosted. Sign up at {domain}, pick a subdomain like myclub.{domain}, and you are ready to run an auction from any browser. We handle servers, backups, SSL and updates.
faq.a2: Each team gets a unique bidding link, regenerable per season. Captains open it on any phone (works at 360px+) and see a mobile-optimized panel: current player, current bid, remaining budget, and a single BID NOW button. Real-time updates via WebSocket — no app to install.
faq.q3: Is my data isolated from other organizations?
faq.a3: Yes. AuctionBall is multi-tenant by design. Every database row carries an org_id and queries are scoped server-side. No other organization can see your players, teams, bids or audit log. You can also export everything as CSV at any time.
faq.q4: Can I run multiple tournaments at once?
faq.a4: Free is limited to 1 active season. Starter allows 3 seasons (concurrent or archived). Pro removes the limit entirely — run as many tournaments in parallel as you need. Each season has fully isolated teams, purse, players and audit log.
faq.q5: What happens to my auction during a network drop?
faq.a5: The auction state lives in our database, not in browser memory, and the timer is server-authoritative. If the auctioneer or a captain loses connection, they reconnect automatically and resume exactly where they left off — bids in flight are not lost.
faq.a6: CSV export of teams, players, sold prices, bid history and unsold list ships with Starter and above. PDF export and custom org branding ship with Pro. Your data is yours — export it any time, no lock-in.

payments.heading: Pay the way Bangladesh pays.
payments.footer: Monthly billing · cancel any time · invoices on every plan

cta.free_pill: Free tier · no credit card · live in 5 minutes
cta.body: Create your organization, claim a subdomain, run a full auction on the Free tier. Upgrade when you outgrow it — your data, your players, your seasons all carry over.

footer.about: A hosted platform for live cricket player auctions. Built in Dhaka for tournament organizers everywhere.

auth.welcome_back_subtitle: Log in to your AuctionBall organization.
auth.create_org_subtitle: Pick a subdomain, add an admin, choose a plan. 30 seconds and you are running auctions.
auth.terms_agreement: By signing up you agree to our {terms} and {privacy}.
auth.forgot_subtitle: No worries — type your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.reset_subtitle: Pick a strong one — at least 8 characters.
auth.verify_subtitle: We sent a verification link to your inbox. Click it to activate your account.
auth.verify_link_sent: A new verification email has been sent.
auth.confirm_subtitle: This is a secure area. Please enter your password again to continue.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.no_active_season_body: Create your first season to start adding players and teams. Setting a season as active unlocks the auction control center.

auction.pick_player_prompt: Pick a player from the queue
auction.click_player_hint: Click a player on the left to load them into the live slot.
auction.click_team_hint: Click a team → tap an increment to place a bid as that team.

team_device.waiting_for_player: Waiting for the auctioneer to load a player…
team_device.leading_message: You hold the leading bid — wait for the next bid to act again.
team_device.not_running_message: Bidding opens when the auctioneer starts the timer.

settings.organization_blurb: Update name, subdomain and timezone. Save action lands in the next pass.
settings.currency_blurb: All money is stored in BDT. This setting only changes how amounts appear in the dashboard, big screen, exports and emails. Switch to USD if you're running a federation outside Bangladesh.
settings.custom_domain_blurb: Run AuctionBall on your own host like bpl-cup.example.com. Your big-screen and team-device pages serve from your domain — and the AuctionBall watermark disappears entirely.
settings.upgrade_for_domain: Custom domains are a Pro / Enterprise feature.
settings.dns_step1: Step 1 — Add this TXT record at your DNS provider to prove ownership:
settings.dns_step2: Step 2 — Point your domain at AuctionBall:
settings.confirm_remove_domain: Remove the custom domain? Your big-screen will fall back to the default subdomain.
settings.danger_blurb: Deleting the organization removes all seasons, players, teams and bids. Cannot be undone.

billing.confirm_cancel: Cancel auto-renew? You'll keep your current plan access until the billing period ends.
billing.providers_help: Set PAYPAL_CLIENT_ID/SECRET or BKASH_USERNAME/PASSWORD/APP_KEY/APP_SECRET in .env to enable real payments. Without keys, the dev simulator marks payments instantly successful.
